page.title: Pershing 46: Best Boat in Marbella for Performance sport-yacht style

data.meta_description: Discover why the Pershing 46 is best for high-speed cruising off Marbella. 10 pax, 14m, departs Puerto Banús. Book your sport-yacht adventure today.
data.summary: The Pershing 46 combines Italian sport-yacht performance with Marbella's coastal glamour. This page explains why it's best for thrill-seekers wanting speed, style, and space for 10 guests from Puerto Banús.
key_facts: Pershing 46: 14m length, 10 passengers, departs Puerto Banús.
Top speed over 40 knots – ideal for fast coastal runs.
Open-plan cockpit with sun pads and wet bar.
Inclusions: skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, VAT.
Pricing on request via WhatsApp – no hidden costs.
Perfect for day trips to Cala del Faro, Estepona, or Sotogrande.
Sport-yacht design with deep-V hull for smooth Atlantic swells.
Recommended for groups up to 10 celebrating or sightseeing.

faq.q: How many people can the Pershing 46 carry?
faq.a: The Pershing 46 is licensed for up to 10 passengers. With a 14m length and spacious cockpit, it comfortably accommodates a group for day trips, sunset cruises, or celebrations.

faq.q: What is the top speed of the Pershing 46?
faq.a: The Pershing 46 can exceed 40 knots thanks to its powerful engines and deep-V hull. It is one of the fastest sport yachts available for charter in Marbella, perfect for thrill-seekers.

faq.q: Does the charter include a skipper and fuel?
faq.a: Yes, every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, cava, white wine, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish VAT. No extra charges.

faq.q: Where does the Pershing 46 depart from?
faq.a: All charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's iconic luxury marina. You can also arrange pickup from Marbella Marina or Cabopino on request.

faq.q: What destinations can we visit with the Pershing 46?
faq.a: Popular routes include Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, Estepona, Sotogrande, and the Costa del Sol coastline. Your skipper can tailor the itinerary to your preferences.

faq.q: How do I book the Pershing 46?
faq.a: Pricing is on request. Simply message us on WhatsApp with your preferred date, group size, and duration. We'll confirm availability and send a quote within hours.

faq.q: Is the Pershing 46 suitable for families?
faq.a: Yes, the yacht is safe and stable, with sun pads and shaded areas. Children are welcome, and life jackets are provided. The skipper ensures a comfortable experience.

faq.q: What makes the Pershing 46 best for performance?
faq.a: Its sport-yacht pedigree, high-speed capability, and Italian design set it apart. For groups wanting a fast, stylish day on the water, it outperforms many larger cruisers.

data.body_html:
The Pershing 46 is the best boat in Marbella for performance enthusiasts who want sport-yacht thrills without sacrificing comfort. At 14 metres and licensed for 10 guests, this Italian-built speedster departs from Puerto Banús and delivers top speeds over 40 knots. Whether you're chasing the sunset to Cala del Faro or blasting across the bay to Estepona, the Pershing 46 offers an adrenaline-fuelled charter that few yachts can match. Read on to discover why this is the Pershing 46 best for high-speed cruising, group celebrations, and exploring the Costa del Sol in style.

Pershing 46: Specs and Performance

The Pershing 46 is a true sport yacht, built for speed and agility. Its deep-V hull slices through Atlantic swells, giving a smooth ride even at full throttle. Key specs include:

  • Length: 14 metres (46 feet)
  • Capacity: 10 passengers
  • Top speed: 40+ knots
  • Departure point: Puerto Banús, Marbella
  • Inclusions: Skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, VAT

This yacht is perfect for those who value performance but want a well-appointed cockpit with sun pads, a wet bar, and shaded seating. It is the Pershing 46 best for active groups who want to cover more coastline in less time.

Why the Pershing 46 Is Best for Speed Lovers

If you want to feel the wind in your hair and the roar of powerful engines, the Pershing 46 delivers. Most charter boats in Marbella cruise at 20–25 knots; the Pershing 46 easily exceeds 40 knots, making it ideal for:

  • Thrilling rides between Puerto Banús and Sotogrande
  • Fast transfers to remote coves like Cala Cortés
  • Sunset dashes along the Golden Mile

This speed also means you can visit multiple destinations in a single day, from Estepona's marina to Cabopino's dunes, without wasting time on the water.

Best Boat for Groups of Up to 10

Unlike larger yachts that feel impersonal, the Pershing 46 offers an intimate setting for up to 10 guests. The cockpit is designed for socialising, with wrap-around seating, a wet bar, and ample sunbathing space. It is the Pershing 46 best for:

  • Birthday celebrations
  • Corporate incentives
  • Family day trips
  • Bachelor or bachelorette parties

Every charter includes complimentary drinks (water, soft drinks, beer, cava, white wine) and light snacks, so you can focus on enjoying the ride.

Destinations You Can Reach with the Pershing 46

Departing from Puerto Banús, your skipper can tailor a route based on your preferences. Popular options include:

  • Cala del Faro: A quiet cove with crystal-clear water, 30 minutes at speed.
  • Estepona: Charming town with a colourful marina, 20 NM west.
  • Sotogrande: Luxury resort with beach clubs, 30 NM south.
  • Marbella Marina: Close to the old town and Golden Mile restaurants.

Your skipper knows the best spots for swimming, snorkelling, and lunch stops. The Pershing 46's shallow draft also allows access to near-shore anchorages.

Pricing and Booking

Pricing for the Pershing 46 is on request via WhatsApp. This ensures you get a tailored quote based on your group size, duration, and any special requests. Typical charter durations range from 2 hours to full-day trips. All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and Spanish VAT (21%).

To book, simply send a message with your preferred date and group size. We'll confirm availability and send a competitive quote within hours. The Pershing 46 best for those who value speed and style – book early to secure your slot.

What Guests Love About the Pershing 46

Guests consistently praise the Pershing 46 for its:

  • Incredible acceleration and top speed
  • Spacious cockpit with sun pads
  • Professional, friendly skipper
  • Seamless booking via WhatsApp

It is often described as the best boat in Marbella for performance and a must-try for anyone visiting the Costa del Sol.

Frequently Asked Questions

How many people can the Pershing 46 carry?

The Pershing 46 is licensed for up to 10 passengers. With a 14m length and spacious cockpit, it comfortably accommodates a group for day trips, sunset cruises, or celebrations.

What is the top speed of the Pershing 46?

The Pershing 46 can exceed 40 knots thanks to its powerful engines and deep-V hull. It is one of the fastest sport yachts available for charter in Marbella, perfect for thrill-seekers.

Does the charter include a skipper and fuel?

Yes, every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, cava, white wine, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish VAT. No extra charges.

Where does the Pershing 46 depart from?

All charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's iconic luxury marina. You can also arrange pickup from Marbella Marina or Cabopino on request.

What destinations can we visit with the Pershing 46?

Popular routes include Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, Estepona, Sotogrande, and the Costa del Sol coastline. Your skipper can tailor the itinerary to your preferences.

How do I book the Pershing 46?

Pricing is on request. Simply message us on WhatsApp with your preferred date, group size, and duration. We'll confirm availability and send a quote within hours.

Is the Pershing 46 suitable for families?

Yes, the yacht is safe and stable, with sun pads and shaded areas. Children are welcome, and life jackets are provided. The skipper ensures a comfortable experience.

What makes the Pershing 46 best for performance?

Its sport-yacht pedigree, high-speed capability, and Italian design set it apart. For groups wanting a fast, stylish day on the water, it outperforms many larger cruisers.

Ready to experience the Pershing 46 best for performance? Browse our full fleet or message us on WhatsApp to book your sport-yacht charter today.
